GB/T 13786一2022
Introduction
Artificial daylighting ilumination for cotton classing rooms which employ artificial ilumination unit is
used to simulate ideal daylight of northern latitudes regions under moderately cloudy conditions.
This document explains the ilumination quality，lighting intensity， ilumination conditions，technical
requirements and installation of lighting units，the environment color，maintenance of ilumination
equipment and other technical requirements in detail，These technical conditions are used to guaran-
tee the consistency of cotton colors in the cotton grading room and under ideal natural daylight con-
ditions，to ensure the accuracy and reliability of cotton quality inspection results.

焉
